query:
INSERT INTO minecraft_users (uuid, active, username, access_token, refresh_token, expires, account_type)
            VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7)
            ON CONFLICT (uuid) DO UPDATE SET
                active = $2,
                username = $3,
                access_token = $4,
                refresh_token = $5,
                expires = $6,
                account_type = $7
